arc.action.description.on_add_effect: Fires when the player receives an effect.
arc.action.description.on_advancement: Fires when the player gets an advancement.
arc.action.description.on_block_with_shi: Fires when the player blocks an attack with a shield.
arc.action.description.on_break_block: Fires when the player breaks a block.
arc.action.description.on_breed_animal: Fires when the player breeds an animal.
arc.action.description.on_brew_potion: Fires when the player brews a potion.
arc.action.description.on_change_dimensi: Fires when the player changes dimension.
arc.action.description.on_craft_item: Fires when the player crafts an item.
arc.action.description.on_crouch: Fires when the player is crouching.
arc.action.description.on_crouch_start: Fires when the player starts crouching.
arc.action.description.on_crouch_stop: Fires when the player stops crouching.
arc.action.description.on_drop_item: Fires when the player drops an item.
arc.action.description.on_elytra_fly: Fires when the player is flying with elytra.
arc.action.description.on_elytra_fly_sta: Fires when the player starts flying with elytra.
arc.action.description.on_elytra_fly_sto: Fires when the player stops flying with elytra.
arc.action.description.on_empty_bucket: Fires when the player empties a bucket.
arc.action.description.on_enchant_item: Fires when the player enchants an item.
arc.action.description.on_fill_bucket: Fires when the player fills a bucket.
arc.action.description.on_fished_up_item: Fires when the player fishes up an item.
arc.action.description.on_get_attack_spe: Fires when the game gets the speed at which the player attacks.
arc.action.description.on_get_destroy_sp: Fires when the game gets the speed at which the player destroys a block.
arc.action.description.on_get_hurt: Fires when the player gets hurt.
arc.action.description.on_grind_item: Fires when the player grinds an item.
arc.action.description.on_harvest_crop: Fires when the player harvests a crop.
arc.action.description.on_horse_ride: Fires when the player is riding a horse.
arc.action.description.on_horse_ride_sta: Fires when the player starts riding a horse.
arc.action.description.on_horse_ride_sto: Fires when the player stops riding a horse.
arc.action.description.on_hurt_entity: Fires when the player hurts an entity.
arc.action.description.on_hurt_item: Fires when an item the player is holding takes damage.
arc.action.description.on_hurt_player: Fires when the player hurts another player.
arc.action.description.on_interact_block: Fires when the player interacts with a block.
arc.action.description.on_interact_entit: Fires when the player interacts with an entity.
arc.action.description.on_kill_entity: Fires when the player kills an entity.
arc.action.description.on_land: Fires when the player lands on the ground.
arc.action.description.on_pickup_item: Fires when the player picks up an item.
arc.action.description.on_place_block: Fires when the player places a block.
arc.action.description.on_plant_crop: Fires when the player plants a crop.
arc.action.description.on_rod_reel_in: Fires when the player reels in a fishing rod.
arc.action.description.on_shoot_projecti: Fires when the player shoots a projectile.
arc.action.description.on_smelt_item: Fires when the player smelts an item.
arc.action.description.on_sprint: Fires when the player is sprinting.
arc.action.description.on_sprint_start: Fires when the player starts sprinting.
arc.action.description.on_sprint_stop: Fires when the player stops sprinting.
arc.action.description.on_strip_log: Fires when the player strips a log.
arc.action.description.on_swim: Fires when the player is swimming.
arc.action.description.on_swim_start: Fires when the player starts swimming.
arc.action.description.on_swim_stop: Fires when the player stops swimming.
arc.action.description.on_tame_animal: Fires when the player tames an animal.
arc.action.description.on_throw_item: Fires when the player throws an item.
arc.action.description.on_till_soil: Fires when the player tills soil with a hoe.
arc.action.description.on_trade_with_vil: Fires when the player trades with a villager.
arc.action.description.on_use_anvil: Fires when the player uses an anvil.
arc.action.description.on_use_item: Fires when the player uses an item.
arc.action.description.on_walk: Fires when the player is walking.
arc.action.description.on_walk_start: Fires when the player starts walking.
arc.action.description.on_walk_stop: Fires when the player stops walking.
arc.condition.description.advancement: Is met if the advancement matches the criteria.
arc.condition.description.advancement.in: Is met if the advancement does not match the criteria.
arc.condition.description.biome: Is met if the player is in one of the following biomes: %s.
arc.condition.description.biome.inverted: Is met if the player is not in one of the following biomes: %s.
arc.condition.description.block: Is met if the block is %s.
arc.condition.description.block.inverted: Is met if the block is not %s.
arc.condition.description.block_hardness: Is met if the block's hardness is between %s and %s.
Is met if the block's hardness is not between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.blocks: Is met if the block is one of the following: %s, or has one of the following tags: %s.
arc.condition.description.blocks.inverte: Is met if the block is not one of the following: %s, or does not have one of the following tags: %s.
arc.condition.description.chance: Has a %s chance to be met.
arc.condition.description.chance.inverte: Has a %s chance to not be met.
arc.condition.description.critical_hit: Is met if the attack is a critical hit.
arc.condition.description.critical_hit.i: Is met if the attack is not a critical hit.
arc.condition.description.crop_age: Is met if the crop's age is %s.
arc.condition.description.crop_age.inver: Is met if the crop's age is not %s.
arc.condition.description.crop_fully_gro: Is met if the crop is fully grown.
Is met if the crop is not fully grown.
arc.condition.description.damage_source: Is met if the damage source is %s.
Is met if the damage source is not %s.
arc.condition.description.dimension: Is met if the player is in the %s dimension.
arc.condition.description.dimension.inve: Is met if the player is not in the %s dimension.
arc.condition.description.distance.inver: Is not met every %s blocks traveled.
arc.condition.description.effect: Is met if the effect is %s.
arc.condition.description.effect.inverte: Is met if the effect is not %s.
arc.condition.description.effect_categor: Is met if the effect is in the %s category.
Is met if the effect is not in the %s category.
arc.condition.description.entity_data: Is met if the entity data matches the specified criteria.
arc.condition.description.entity_data.in: Is met if the entity data does not match the specified criteria.
arc.condition.description.entity_in_bloc: Is met if the entity is in a %s block.
Is met if the entity is not in a %s block.
arc.condition.description.entity_type: Is met if the entity is a %s.
arc.condition.description.entity_type.in: Is met if the entity is not a %s.
arc.condition.description.entity_types: Is met if the entity is one of the following: %s.
arc.condition.description.entity_types.i: Is met if the entity is not one of the following: %s.
arc.condition.description.exp_drop: Is met if the experience drop is between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.exp_drop.inver: Is met if the experience drop is not between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.exp_level: Is met if the experience level is %s.
arc.condition.description.exp_level.inve: Is met if the experience level is not %s.
arc.condition.description.food_level: Is met if the player's food level is %s %s.
arc.condition.description.food_level.inv: Is met if the player's food level is not %s %s.
arc.condition.description.full_armor_set: Is met if the player is wearing a full set of the following armor: %s.
Is met if the player is not wearing a full set of the following armor: %s.
arc.condition.description.hand: Is met if the interaction hand is %s.
arc.condition.description.hand.inverted: Is met if the interaction hand is not %s.
arc.condition.description.has_enchantmen: Is met if the item has the enchantment %s with a level that is %s.
Is met if the item does not have the enchantment %s with a level that is %s.
arc.condition.description.health: Is met if the player's health is %s %s.
arc.condition.description.health.inverte: Is met if the player's health is not %s %s.
arc.condition.description.inventory_empt: Is met if the player's inventory is empty.
Is met if the player's inventory is not empty.
arc.condition.description.inventory_full: Is met if the player's inventory is full.
Is met if the player's inventory is not full.
arc.condition.description.is_blasting_re: Is met if the recipe is a blasting recipe.
Is met if the recipe is not a blasting recipe.
arc.condition.description.is_blocking: Is met if the player is blocking.
arc.condition.description.is_blocking.in: Is met if the player is not blocking.
arc.condition.description.is_ore: Is met if the block is an ore.
arc.condition.description.is_ore.inverte: Is met if the block is not an ore.
arc.condition.description.is_riding: Is met if the player is riding an entity.
arc.condition.description.is_riding.inve: Is met if the player is not riding an entity.
arc.condition.description.is_sleeping: Is met if the player is sleeping.
arc.condition.description.is_sleeping.in: Is met if the player is not sleeping.
arc.condition.description.is_smoking_rec: Is met if the recipe is a smoking recipe.
Is met if the recipe is not a smoking recipe.
arc.condition.description.is_sneaking: Is met if the player is sneaking.
arc.condition.description.is_sneaking.in: Is met if the player is not sneaking.
arc.condition.description.is_underwater: Is met if the player is underwater.
Is met if the player is not underwater.
arc.condition.description.is_wet: Is met if the player is wet.
arc.condition.description.is_wet.inverte: Is met if the player is not wet.
arc.condition.description.item: Is met if the item is %s.
arc.condition.description.item.inverted: Is met if the item is not %s.
arc.condition.description.item_durabilit: Is met if the item's durability is %s %s.
Is met if the item's durability is not %s %s.
arc.condition.description.item_equipped: Is met if the player has %s equipped.
Is met if the player does not have %s equipped.
arc.condition.description.item_in_hand: Is met if the player is holding %s in their %s.
arc.condition.description.item_in_hand.i: Is met if the player is not holding %s in their %s.
arc.condition.description.item_in_invent: Is met if the player has %s in their inventory.
Is met if the player does not have %s in their inventory.
arc.condition.description.items: Is met if the item is one of the following: %s, or has one of the following tags: %s.
arc.condition.description.items.inverted: Is met if the item is not one of the following: %s, or does not have one of the following tags: %s.
arc.condition.description.light_level: Is met if the light level is %s %s.
arc.condition.description.light_level.in: Is met if the light level is not %s %s.
arc.condition.description.not_in_block_p: Is met if the block position is not in the cache of recently placed blocks.
Is met if the block position is in the cache of recently placed blocks.
arc.condition.description.on_fire: Is met if the player is on fire.
arc.condition.description.on_fire.invert: Is met if the player is not on fire.
arc.condition.description.or: Is met if any of the specified conditions are met.
arc.condition.description.or.inverted: Is met if none of the specified conditions are met.
arc.condition.description.ready_for_shea: Is met if an entity is ready to be sheared.
Is met if an entity is not ready to be sheared.
arc.condition.description.riding_entity_: Is met if the player is riding a %s.
Is met if the player is not riding a %s.
arc.condition.description.saturation_lev: Is met if the player's saturation level is %s %s.
Is met if the player's saturation level is not %s %s.
arc.condition.description.scoreboard: Is met if the player's score on objective %s is between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.scoreboard.inv: Is met if the player's score on objective %s is not between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.structure: Is met if the player is in a structure with the tag %s.
arc.condition.description.structure.inve: Is met if the player is not in a structure with the tag %s.
arc.condition.description.target_health: Is met if the target's health is %s %s.
Is met if the target's health is not %s %s.
arc.condition.description.team: Is met if the player is on the %s team.
arc.condition.description.team.inverted: Is met if the player is not on the %s team.
arc.condition.description.time_of_day: Is met if the time of day is between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.time_of_day.in: Is met if the time of day is not between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.weather: Is met if the weather is %s.
arc.condition.description.weather.invert: Is met if the weather is not %s.
arc.condition.description.y_level: Is met if the player's Y-level is between %s and %s.
arc.condition.description.y_level.invert: Is met if the player's Y-level is not between %s and %s.
arc.reward.description.attack_speed_mult: Multiplies the player's attack speed by %s.
arc.reward.description.cleanse_effects: Removes potion effects from the player.
arc.reward.description.destroy_speed_mul: Multiplies the player's block breaking speed by %s.
arc.reward.description.drop_item: Drops %s %s at the location of the action.
arc.reward.description.effect: Applies the %s effect to the player for %s with an amplifier of %s.
arc.reward.description.effect_amplifier_: Adds %s to the amplifier of an effect.
arc.reward.description.effect_duration_m: Multiplies the duration of an effect by %s.
arc.reward.description.enchant_held_item: Enchants the item in the specified hand.
arc.reward.description.entity_on_fire: Sets the target entity on fire for %s seconds.
arc.reward.description.exp: Grants the player between %s and %s experience point(s).
arc.reward.description.give_knowledge: Unlocks the specified recipes for the player.
arc.reward.description.launch_player: Launches the player with forces of %s.
arc.reward.description.move_to_entity: Moves the player towards the target entity with a force of %s.
arc.reward.description.pull_entity: Pulls the target entity towards the player.
arc.reward.description.push_entity: Pushes the target entity away from the player.
arc.reward.description.remove_effect: Removes an effect from the player.
arc.reward.description.repair_held_item: Repairs the item held in the specified hand by %s.
arc.reward.description.set_block: Sets the block at the player's position to %s.
arc.reward.description.smelt_inventory: Smelts all smeltable items in the player's inventory.
arc.reward.description.strike_lightning: Strikes lightning at the target position.
arc.reward.description.teleport_player: Teleports the player randomly within a %s block radius.
